title: OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID - 211info
text: DALLAS OFFICE OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides in-home care. Services include housekeeping, personal care, laundry, shopping, transportation, and meal preparation and delivery. Adult day services (non-residential community-based programs, providing services for part of the day). Registered nurse services (one-time or intermittent assessment, service planning, medication monitoring, provider training, and education). Also offers case management and options counseling (counseling to support informed decision-making on services based on strengths, needs, and preferences). Service hours per person vary depending on assessed need and funding amounts. Benefits will not be subject to estate recovery. 260 NE Kings Valley Highway Dallas, OR 97338 Eligibility: Adults age 18 and older who meet the following criteria: -Need help from another person with personal care tasks -Income no greater than 400% of the Federal Poverty Level -Assets no greater than the average cost of six months in a nursing facility -Currently living in their own home and not a provider-operator or owned facility or foster/care home Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 304-3420 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 304-3420 Toll-free (866) 206-4799 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. Some services may have a waitlist. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income and assets LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Polk County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in a two-story building next door to the Best Western Hotel and across from Walmart. If coming from Salem, take the second Dallas exit off Highway 22 and continue on Kings Valley Highway until Walmart. Services: Adult Day Programs * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Adult Day Programs * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Case/Care Management * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Case/Care Management * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Disability Related Transportation * Medicaid Recipients Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Errand Running/Shopping Assistance * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Home Delivered Meals * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Home Delivered Meals * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Housekeeping Assistance * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Housekeeping Assistance * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults In Home Meal Preparation * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients In Home Meal Preparation * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Personal Care * Adults With Disabilities/Health Conditions * Medicaid Recipients Personal Care * Medicaid Recipients * Older Adults Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - HEALTH AND WELLNESS PROGRAMS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
